positive: Minimalist stylized celestial body gathering. A large, crescent-shaped moon with subtle cracks of starlight, positioned centrally. Emerging from the moon's silhouette are elegant, intertwined botanical branches featuring luminous, glowing bioluminescent flowers (like ethereal lotuses and night-blooming jasmine). The background should be deep cosmic navy and velvet black, sprinkled with very faint, scattered nebulae dust. Focus on strong, clean contrast between the brilliant white-gold luminescence of the flowers/moon and the deep, saturated background. Highly detailed linework, vector-like smoothness, suitable for screen printing on dark fabric, clean silhouette, symmetrical composition. Art Nouveau meets Cosmic Minimalism. --ar 1:1
negative: ugly, deformed, extra limbs, bad anatomy, blur, noisy, amateur, writing, text, logo, watermark, signature, blurry, low resolution, muddy, artifacts, gradients, photorealism, jpeg artifacts
